query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `articles` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`title` text NOT NULL,
	`category` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
	`operator` varchar(200),
	`role` varchar(100),
	`location` varchar(200) NOT NULL,
	`locationLat` decimal(10,6),
	`locationLng` decimal(10,6),
	`image` text NOT NULL,
	`summary` text NOT NULL,
	`description` text,
	`necessity` text,
	`connections` text,
	`editorComment` text,
	`heroSummary` text,
	`isCaseStudy` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
	`tags` json,
	`seasonalMonths` json,
	`relatedIndustries` json,
	`timelinePast` text,
	`timelinePresent` text,
	`timelineFuture` text,
	`timelinePhase1` text,
	`timelinePhase2` text,
	`timelinePhase3` text,
	`timelinePhase4` text,
	`deepDive` json,
	`actions` json,
	`challengeCard` json,
	`regrets` json,
	`changes` json,
	`decisionMatrix` json,
	`decisionProcess` json,
	`barriers` json,
	`supportSystem` json,
	`details` json,
	`story` json,
	`behindTheScenes` json,
	`recommendedSupports` json,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `articles_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
